hypothesis: The best model so far uses num_leaves=256 (WRMSSE=0.94669). Now testing whether increasing n_estimators to 1200 with a lower learning_rate=0.03 can further improve by allowing more boosting rounds to refine predictions. Keep num_leaves=256, min_child_samples=50, lambda_l2=0.1 unchanged. Use early_stopping_rounds=50 to prevent overfitting. The hypothesis is that the current model may be underfitting due to too few trees.
